name: Lemon and Lime Curd
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lemons and limes and dry them.
2. Finely shred lemon peels to make 1/4 cup. Avoid getting the white pith mixed in with the rind.
3. Squeeze enough juice from the lemons and limes to make 1 1/3 cups total.
4. In a heavy-bottomed saucepan, combine the juice and sugar.
5. Stir in the eggs, margarine, and lemon peel.
6. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture coats the back of a metal spoon (do not boil). This should take about 8 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and pour into jars.
8. Keep in refrigerator.
9. Makes 3 servings of 1 cup each.
10. Stores in refrigerator for up to 2 months.
- Per 2 tablespoons: 100 calories.
